name: send_text_message
description: Send a text message to a WhatsApp number. Supports markdown-like formatting (*bold*, _italic_, ~strikethrough~, ```monospace```).

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code (e.g. +14155551234)

arguments.name: preview_url
arguments.desc: Render URL preview if the body contains a link

name: send_template_message
description: Send an approved template message. Required for initiating conversations outside the 24-hour customer service window.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.desc: Template name as registered in Meta

arguments.name: components
arguments.desc: Template components array with header/body/button parameters

name: send_image_message
description: Send an image via URL or previously uploaded media ID.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: link
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the image (mutually exclusive with media_id)

arguments.name: media_id
arguments.desc: Media ID from a prior upload (mutually exclusive with link)

name: send_video_message
description: Send a video via URL or media ID. Max 16MB, mp4/3gp.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: link
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the video

arguments.name: media_id
arguments.desc: Media ID from a prior upload

name: send_document_message
description: Send a document (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, etc.) via URL or media ID. Max 100MB.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: link
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the document

arguments.name: media_id
arguments.desc: Media ID from a prior upload

name: send_audio_message
description: Send an audio file via URL or media ID. Max 16MB. Supported: aac, amr, mp3, mp4, ogg/opus.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: link
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the audio

arguments.name: media_id
arguments.desc: Media ID from a prior upload

name: send_sticker_message
description: Send a WebP sticker via URL or media ID. Static max 100KB, animated max 500KB.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: link
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the sticker (.webp)

arguments.name: media_id
arguments.desc: Media ID from a prior upload

name: send_location_message
description: Send a location pin to a WhatsApp number.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

name: send_contact_message
description: Send one or more contact cards. Only formatted_name is required per contact.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: contacts
arguments.desc: Array of contact objects with name (formatted_name required), phones, emails, org, and urls

name: send_reaction
description: React to a message with an emoji. Send an empty emoji string to remove a reaction.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: message_id
arguments.desc: The wamid of the message to react to

arguments.name: emoji
arguments.desc: Emoji character or empty string to remove

name: send_interactive_buttons
description: Send a message with up to 3 reply buttons.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: buttons
arguments.desc: 1-3 reply buttons, each with id and title

name: send_interactive_list
description: Send a message with a selectable list (up to 10 sections, 10 rows each).

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Recipient phone number with country code

arguments.name: button_text
arguments.desc: Text on the list open button (e.g. View Options)

arguments.name: sections
arguments.desc: List sections, each with title and rows (id, title, description)

name: mark_as_read
description: Mark a message as read (blue double-check). Also marks all earlier messages in the conversation.

arguments.name: message_id
arguments.desc: The wamid of the message to mark as read

name: list_templates
description: List all approved/pending/rejected message templates for the business account.

name: get_template
description: Get full details of a specific message template by ID.

name: create_template
description: Create a new message template. Templates require Meta approval before use. Categories: AUTHENTICATION, MARKETING, UTILITY.

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Template name (lowercase alphanumeric and underscores only)

arguments.name: components
arguments.desc: Template components array. Each component: {type: HEADER|BODY|FOOTER|BUTTONS, ...}

name: edit_template
description: Edit an existing message template by ID. Only the provided fields are updated.

name: delete_template
description: Delete a message template by name. This deletes all language versions of the template.

name: upload_media
description: Upload a media file from a public URL to WhatsApp servers. Returns a media ID you can use to send messages. Media is stored for 14 days.

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Public HTTPS URL of the file to upload

arguments.name: mime_type
arguments.desc: MIME type (e.g. image/jpeg, image/png, video/mp4, audio/mpeg, application/pdf)

name: get_media_url
description: Retrieve the download URL for a media ID (e.g. from an incoming message). The URL is temporary.

name: delete_media
description: Delete a previously uploaded media file by ID.

name: get_business_profile
description: Get the WhatsApp Business profile (about, address, description, email, etc.).

name: update_business_profile
description: Update the WhatsApp Business profile. Only provided fields are changed.

name: get_phone_number_info
description: Get info about the registered WhatsApp phone number (quality rating, verified name, status).

arguments.name: phone_number_id
arguments.desc: Phone number ID (defaults to the configured one)

name: list_phone_numbers
description: List all phone numbers registered under the WhatsApp Business Account.
